create.title: New entity
create.subtitle: Pick a kind, then fill the attributes merged across its genres.
create.not_adopted: Adopt an ontology for this book first — open Ontology to scaffold genres and kinds.

manage.title: Ontology
manage.subtitle: Genres, kinds, and attributes for this book — adopted from the standards, yours to edit.
manage.not_adopted: This book has no ontology yet
manage.not_adopted_hint: Adopt genres and kinds from the standards to scaffold this book. You can always adopt more or add your own later.
manage.load_failed: Failed to load the book ontology

adopt.title: Adopt standards into this book
adopt.subtitle: Pick the genres and kinds to copy down. universal and the unknown kind are always included.
adopt.unknown_auto: Unknown kind is always included for unrecognized entities.
adopt.none_selected: Select at least one genre or kind.

quickcreate.name: Name
quickcreate.code_hint: Leave blank to auto-derive from the name.

col.select_kind: Select a kind to see its attributes
col.empty_kinds: No kinds linked to this genre yet.
col.empty_attrs: No attributes for this kind × genre yet.

attr.none_selected: Select an attribute to edit it.
attr.name: Name
attr.revert_hint: Discard this book's local edits to this row and restore the System/User standard it was adopted from.
attr.auto_fill_prompt_hint: How the AI fills this attribute from chapter text
attr.translation_hint_hint: Guidance injected when translating this attribute's value
attr.from_system: Adopted from a System standard — edits here change this book's copy only.

matrix.title: Attribute matrix
matrix.subtitle: Attributes for one kind across its active genres. Same code in two genres is kept both, namespaced.
matrix.select_kind: Pick a kind to see its attribute matrix.
matrix.no_active: No active genres. Add one to build the matrix.
matrix.no_cell: Click a cell to inspect it.

entity.genres_hint: Inherited from the book; drop a genre to skip its attributes for this entity. universal is mandatory.
entity.conflict_body: The code is defined by more than one genre with different meanings. Both are kept, namespaced as code·genre, so neither is silently lost.

sync.title: Updates & Sync
sync.subtitle: Your book holds a frozen copy of what it adopted. Nothing changes until you apply.
sync.retired_card_body: Nothing happened to your data — your book's copy and its entities are frozen and intact. A retired source never deletes a consumer.

del.genre_body: Removes this genre from the book and deprecates its attributes and kind links. Existing entities keep their data; you can re-adopt the genre later.
del.kind_body: Removes this kind from the book and deprecates its attributes. Existing entities of this kind keep their data; you can re-adopt the kind later.

toast.forbidden: You need Manage access on this book to make changes
